# Transcrição: It's_NOT_about_you

- **Fonte:** It's_NOT_about_you
- **Duração:** 01:02
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:02]

You have to understand that when you're presenting in front of other people, it's not about you. It's not about you for goodness sake. Once you've done all your rehearsal, you've done all the things you can, you've added the storytelling, you're going to use your voice brilliantly, stop. It's not about you. It's about the audience. Stop worrying about how you sound, how you look and all that. It's not about you. The moment you step on stage, all of the stuff you've done for this person is done. And if you're worrying about that still at this point, you're going to give a bad presentation, so you now know all the tools. When you get on stage, it has nothing to do with you. It is all about value for them. You've got to get over yourself at that point. I'm here to, I love this word they use in the American culture. I'm here to serve you. I'm here to serve. You
